summary: FR-SHARE-001 JSON Export/Import implementation is complete on branch feature/17-json-export-import. Production code (exportService.ts, ActionBar.tsx, useBrickStore.ts) was already present on the branch. Full test suite (7 test IDs: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through T-FE-SHARE-001-04, T-E2E-AFOL-001-01, T-E2E-ERR-001-01, T-SEC-SEC-001-01) added from PR #51. PR #55 is open targeting main. Handoff artifacts committed on the branch.

artifacts.name: exportService
artifacts.description: exportModelJSON (versioned JSON download) + importModelJSON (validation + XSS sanitization). FR-SHARE-001, NFR-SEC-002.

artifacts.name: ActionBar
artifacts.description: Export JSON (btn-export) + Import JSON (btn-import) buttons. FileReader handler, error notification, scene preservation on import error. CLR-05.

artifacts.name: useBrickStore
artifacts.description: Zustand store with setBricks + setNotification actions.

artifacts.name: unit-tests-exportService
artifacts.description: T-FE-SHARE-001-01, T-FE-SHARE-001-02, T-FE-SHARE-001-03, sanitization, download trigger.

artifacts.name: implementation-pr
artifacts.description: Implementation PR #55 on feature/17-json-export-import targeting main.

human_review_required.reason: Playwright E2E tests require a running dev server; CI must be configured to start the app before running test:e2e

recommended_actions: Review PR #55 (feature/17-json-export-import → main) for FR-SHARE-001 implementation
Verify exportService.ts: exportModelJSON triggers download, importModelJSON validates + sanitizes
Verify ActionBar.tsx: btn-export, btn-import, FileReader handler, error notification, scene preservation
Check NFR-SEC-002: allowlist validation in importModelJSON (type, colorId, rotation)
Check CLR-05: import error shows notification, bricks unchanged
Approve or request changes on PR #55
